examples.title: CLT Simulation
examples.description: Demonstrate convergence of sample means to normal
examples.code:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

samples = [np.mean(np.random.exponential(1, 100)) for _ in range(1000)]
plt.hist(samples, bins=30, density=True)
plt.show()
examples.explanation: Generates 1000 sample means from exponential distribution
examples.timeComplexity: O(n*m) for n samples size m
